title: neanotis nummularia
intro: Neanotis nummularia is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coin-leaved Neanotis. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Neanotis nummularia include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. In traditional medicine, Neanotis nummularia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves are also used in various herbal preparations, including teas and topical creams.
